Merfolk dance corslet
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Chest
Value: 84
Keywords: Advanced diving gear
Diving gear
Expert diving gear
Regional
Underwater
Search
Keywords: 		Global
Syrenthia
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

Coordinated pieces of clothing for your torso to embody the dancing spirit of the merfolk.

The Merfolk dance corslet item is a loot item.

Requirement

  • Have [60] Syrenthia faction reputation.

Attributes

Global +5% Work efficiency
Global +10% Chest finding
Global +7% Double action
While in the Syrenthia area.

Uses

Mysterious Merchant

Shop Name Payment
Mysterious Merchant 30

Sources

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
Chest of Syrenthia 1 0.375% 1.492% ~1 in 67

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.

Mysterious Merchant

Shop Name Price
Mysterious Merchant 120

Trivia

  • This item is part of the Merfolk Dance Set.
